mapper.sql: branch_cd, regist_date, card_sales, cash_sales, comment, created_by, created_date, last_updated_by, last_updated_date
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO sales () VALUES ( #{branchCd}, #{registDate}, #{cardSales}, #{cashSales}, #{comment}, #{createdBy}, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, #{lastUpdatedBy}, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP )
mapper.update: UPDATE sales SET card_sales = #{cardSales}, cash_sales = #{cashSales}, comment = #{comment}, last_updated_by = #{lastUpdatedBy}, last_updated_date= CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE branch_cd = #{branchCd} AND regist_date = #{registDate}
